requirement_topic.en: ICE / ARESEP Grid-Interconnection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116 at 60 Hz), 60 Hz / 120-240 V Grid Settings, and Generación Distribuida Para Autoconsumo Framework
requirement_topic.zh: ICE / ARESEP并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116，60 Hz）、60 Hz / 120-240 V电网参数及「分布式自用发电」框架
requirement_topic.zht: ICE / ARESEP併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116，60 Hz）、60 Hz / 120-240 V電網參數及「分散式自用發電」框架

summary.en: Costa Rica's grid operates at 60 Hz and 120/240 V single-phase split-phase (equivalent to the North American standard), fundamentally different from China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V. Distributed solar PV interconnection is governed by ARESEP (Autoridad Reguladora de los Servicios Públicos) under the generación distribuida para autoconsumo net-metering/net-billing framework (established by Ley 9518 of 2018 and its regulations), implemented by ICE (Instituto Costarricense de Electricidad) and the four licensed electricity distributors: CNFL (Compañía Nacional de Fuerza y Luz), Coopeguanacaste, JASEC (Junta Administrativa del Servicio Eléctrico Municipal de Cartago), and ESPH (Empresa de Servicios Públicos de Heredia). Key inverter interconnection requirements include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test validated at 60 Hz — the inverter must detect loss of mains and cease energising the grid within the standard's prescribed limits; (2) IEC 61727 (Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface) compliance for the 60 Hz Americas grid interface; (3) firmware and protection relay settings validated against Costa Rica's 60 Hz / 120 V single-phase or 120/240 V split-phase parameters; (4) ARESEP and the relevant distributor application, technical review, and commissioning inspection before grid connection under the generación distribuida scheme.
summary.zh: 哥斯达黎加电网采用60 Hz及120/240 V单相分相（与北美标准相同），与中国50 Hz / 220-380 V根本不同。分布式太阳能光伏并网受ARESEP（公共服务监管局）在「分布式自用发电」净计量/净结算框架（由2018年第9518号法及其法规确立）下管辖，由ICE（哥斯达黎加电力公司）及四家持牌配电商执行：CNFL（国家电力照明公司）、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC（卡塔戈市立电气服务行政委员会）和ESPH（埃雷迪亚公共服务企业）。逆变器并网的主要要求包括：（1）在60 Hz下经验证的IEC 62116防孤岛测试——逆变器须在标准规定限值内检测电网断电并停止向电网送电；（2）符合60 Hz美洲电网接口的IEC 61727（光伏系统——公用电网接口特性）；（3）针对哥斯达黎加60 Hz / 120 V单相或120/240 V分相参数验证的固件和保护继电器整定；（4）在「分布式自用发电」方案下并网前须完成ARESEP及相关配电商申请、技术审查和调试检查。
summary.zht: 哥斯大黎加電網採用60 Hz及120/240 V單相分相（與北美標準相同），與中國50 Hz / 220-380 V根本不同。分散式太陽能光伏併網受ARESEP（公共服務監管局）在「分散式自用發電」淨計量/淨結算框架（由2018年第9518號法及其法規確立）下管轄，由ICE（哥斯大黎加電力公司）及四家持牌配電商執行：CNFL（國家電力照明公司）、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC（卡塔戈市立電氣服務行政委員會）和ESPH（埃雷迪亞公共服務企業）。逆變器併網的主要要求包括：（1）在60 Hz下經驗證的IEC 62116防孤島測試——逆變器須在標準規定限值內偵測電網斷電並停止向電網送電；（2）符合60 Hz美洲電網接口的IEC 61727（光伏系統——公用電網接口特性）；（3）針對哥斯大黎加60 Hz / 120 V單相或120/240 V分相參數驗證的韌體和保護繼電器整定；（4）在「分散式自用發電」方案下併網前須完成ARESEP及相關配電商申請、技術審查和調試檢查。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (must be validated at 60 Hz for Costa Rica)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (60 Hz Americas grid interface)
Ley 9518 — Ley de Incentivos y Promoción para el Transporte Eléctrico (2018) — establishes the generación distribuida para autoconsumo framework
ARESEP — Autoridad Reguladora de los Servicios Públicos — regulatory framework for distributed generation interconnection
ICE (Instituto Costarricense de Electricidad) — grid interconnection rules for customers on ICE distribution network
CNFL / Coopeguanacaste / JASEC / ESPH — individual distributor interconnection technical requirements

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable at 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004-2018 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), and domestic anti-islanding test results conducted at 50 Hz. These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid conditions and are not applicable to Costa Rica's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid. The frequency and voltage differences are fundamental: a Chinese inverter's anti-islanding algorithm validated at 50 Hz is not automatically effective or compliant at 60 Hz; firmware protection thresholds, reconnection timers, and frequency-trip windows set for 50 Hz Chinese grid conditions must be reconfigured and retested for Costa Rica's 60 Hz grid before interconnection.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于10 kV及以上）、NB/T 32004-2018（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）、GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），以及在50 Hz下进行的国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国并网文件基于中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网条件，不适用于哥斯达黎加60 Hz / 120-240 V电网。频率和电压差异是根本性的：在50 Hz下验证的中国逆变器防孤岛算法不能自动在60 Hz下有效或合规；针对中国50 Hz电网条件设定的固件保护阈值、重连定时器和频率跳闸窗口，必须在并网前针对哥斯达黎加60 Hz电网重新配置和测试。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於10 kV及以上）、NB/T 32004-2018（光伏並網逆變器技術規範）、GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），以及在50 Hz下進行的國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國併網文件基於中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網條件，不適用於哥斯大黎加60 Hz / 120-240 V電網。頻率和電壓差異是根本性的：在50 Hz下驗證的中國逆變器防孤島算法不能自動在60 Hz下有效或合規；針對中國50 Hz電網條件設定的韌體保護閾值、重連計時器和頻率跳閘窗口，必須在併網前針對哥斯大黎加60 Hz電網重新配置和測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System — 50 Hz-based)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages — China: 220/380 V at 50 Hz)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters — 50 Hz-based)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters — 50 Hz-based)

gap.en: Gap: The 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid difference is the single most critical hardware and firmware gap for Chinese inverters entering Costa Rica. Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents (all 50 Hz-based) do not satisfy ICE/ARESEP interconnection requirements. Exporters and system designers must: (a) confirm the inverter model supports 60 Hz operation and 120/240 V split-phase output natively or via configuration; (b) obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence specifically validated at 60 Hz from an ILAC-accredited laboratory — 50 Hz test results do not transfer; (c) obtain IEC 61727 grid interface compliance evidence for the 60 Hz Americas interface; (d) reconfigure and document inverter firmware protection thresholds (under-frequency, over-frequency, under-voltage, over-voltage, reconnection delay) for Costa Rica's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid before commissioning; (e) apply through the relevant distributor (ICE, CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, or ESPH) under the ARESEP generación distribuida para autoconsumo scheme and pass the distributor's technical review and final interconnection inspection.
gap.zh: 差距：60 Hz / 120-240 V电网差异是中国逆变器进入哥斯达黎加最关键的硬件和固件差距。中国GB/T并网文件（均基于50 Hz）不满足ICE/ARESEP并网要求。出口商和系统设计方须：（a）确认逆变器型号原生支持或可通过配置支持60 Hz运行和120/240 V分相输出；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得专门在60 Hz下验证的IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据——50 Hz测试结果不可移植；（c）取得60 Hz美洲接口的IEC 61727电网接口合规证据；（d）调试前针对哥斯达黎加60 Hz / 120-240 V电网重新配置并记录逆变器固件保护阈值（低频、过频、欠压、过压、重连延迟）；（e）通过相关配电商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）在ARESEP「分布式自用发电」方案下申请，并通过配电商技术审查和最终并网检查。
gap.zht: 差距：60 Hz / 120-240 V電網差異是中國逆變器進入哥斯大黎加最關鍵的硬體和韌體差距。中國GB/T併網文件（均基於50 Hz）不滿足ICE/ARESEP併網要求。出口商和系統設計方須：（a）確認逆變器型號原生支援或可透過配置支援60 Hz運行和120/240 V分相輸出；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得專門在60 Hz下驗證的IEC 62116防孤島測試證據——50 Hz測試結果不可移植；（c）取得60 Hz美洲接口的IEC 61727電網接口合規證據；（d）調試前針對哥斯大黎加60 Hz / 120-240 V電網重新配置並記錄逆變器韌體保護閾值（低頻、過頻、欠壓、過壓、重連延遲）；（e）透過相關配電商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）在ARESEP「分散式自用發電」方案下申請，並通過配電商技術審查和最終併網檢查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid interconnection under Costa Rica's generación distribuida para autoconsumo scheme; 60 Hz compliance, anti-islanding validation, and distributor technical review are non-negotiable gates
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese 50 Hz-based grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements only; it does not transfer to Costa Rica's 60 Hz ICE/ARESEP interconnection acceptance

source.publisher: ARESEP (Autoridad Reguladora de los Servicios Públicos) — Costa Rica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Costa Rica's grid is 60 Hz / 120-240 V — fundamentally different from China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V. Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents and 50 Hz anti-islanding test results do not transfer. Confirm the inverter model is rated for 60 Hz / 120-240 V operation, obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence validated at 60 Hz, and reconfigure firmware protection settings before commissioning. Apply through the relevant distributor under ARESEP's generación distribuida para autoconsumo framework and verify current interconnection technical requirements directly with the applicable distributor (ICE, CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, or ESPH) before committing equipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥斯达黎加电网为60 Hz / 120-240 V，与中国50 Hz / 220-380 V根本不同。中国GB/T并网文件和50 Hz防孤岛测试结果不可移植。请确认逆变器型号额定支持60 Hz / 120-240 V运行，取得在60 Hz下验证的IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据，并在调试前重新配置固件保护整定。请通过相关配电商在ARESEP「分布式自用发电」框架下申请，并在提交设备前直接向适用配电商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）核实当前并网技术要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥斯大黎加電網為60 Hz / 120-240 V，與中國50 Hz / 220-380 V根本不同。中國GB/T併網文件和50 Hz防孤島測試結果不可移植。請確認逆變器型號額定支援60 Hz / 120-240 V運行，取得在60 Hz下驗證的IEC 62116防孤島測試證據，並在調試前重新配置韌體保護整定。請透過相關配電商在ARESEP「分散式自用發電」框架下申請，並在提交設備前直接向適用配電商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）核實當前併網技術要求。

requirement_topic.en: ARESEP Generación Distribuida Para Autoconsumo — Net-Metering Scheme, Application Process, and Distributor Interconnection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ARESEP「分布式自用发电」——净计量方案、申请流程及配电商并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: ARESEP「分散式自用發電」——淨計量方案、申請流程及配電商併網要求

summary.en: Costa Rica's distributed solar PV framework for residential, commercial, and industrial self-consumption is governed by Ley 9518 (2018) and ARESEP implementing regulations. Under this scheme, eligible customers install grid-tied PV systems and inject surplus generation into the distribution grid, receiving net-metering or net-billing credits on their electricity bill. The applicable distributor (ICE, CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, or ESPH, depending on service area) manages the interconnection application, reviews technical documentation including inverter compliance evidence, installs a bidirectional meter, and conducts a final site inspection before the system is allowed to operate grid-connected. Costa Rica's grid is ~99–100% renewable (dominated by hydropower, geothermal, and wind), making anti-islanding and grid-quality compliance especially critical for maintaining grid stability. Chinese PV inverters supplied to Costa Rica generación distribuida projects must comply with the relevant distributor's technical interconnection requirements, which reference IEC standards adapted to 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid conditions.
summary.zh: 哥斯达黎加面向居民、商业和工业自用的分布式太阳能光伏框架受第9518号法（2018年）及ARESEP实施法规管辖。在该方案下，符合条件的用户安装并网光伏系统，将剩余发电量注入配电网，并在电费账单中获得净计量或净结算抵减。相关配电商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH，取决于服务区域）管理并网申请、审查技术文件（包括逆变器合规证据）、安装双向电表，并在系统允许并网运行前进行最终现场检查。哥斯达黎加电网约99–100%为可再生能源（以水力、地热和风能为主），使防孤岛和电网质量合规对维护电网稳定性尤为关键。供应至哥斯达黎加「分布式自用发电」项目的中国光伏逆变器须符合相关配电商的技术并网要求，该要求引用了适配60 Hz / 120-240 V电网条件的IEC标准。
summary.zht: 哥斯大黎加面向住宅、商業和工業自用的分散式太陽能光伏框架受第9518號法（2018年）及ARESEP實施法規管轄。在該方案下，符合條件的用戶安裝併網光伏系統，將剩餘發電量注入配電網，並在電費帳單中獲得淨計量或淨結算抵減。相關配電商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH，取決於服務區域）管理併網申請、審查技術文件（包括逆變器合規證據）、安裝雙向電表，並在系統允許併網運行前進行最終現場檢查。哥斯大黎加電網約99–100%為可再生能源（以水力、地熱和風能為主），使防孤島和電網質量合規對維護電網穩定性尤為關鍵。供應至哥斯大黎加「分散式自用發電」項目的中國光伏逆變器須符合相關配電商的技術併網要求，該要求引用了適配60 Hz / 120-240 V電網條件的IEC標準。

standards_or_laws: Ley 9518 — Ley de Incentivos y Promoción para el Transporte Eléctrico (2018) — establishes generación distribuida para autoconsumo legal framework in Costa Rica
ARESEP regulatory resolutions governing distributed generation tariffs, technical requirements, and application procedures
ICE — Instituto Costarricense de Electricidad — interconnection technical requirements for ICE distribution network customers
CNFL — Compañía Nacional de Fuerza y Luz — interconnection requirements (San José metro area)
Coopeguanacaste — electric cooperative interconnection requirements (Guanacaste region)
JASEC — Junta Administrativa del Servicio Eléctrico Municipal de Cartago — interconnection requirements (Cartago region)
ESPH — Empresa de Servicios Públicos de Heredia — interconnection requirements (Heredia region)

summary.en: China does not have a direct programme equivalent to Costa Rica's generación distribuida para autoconsumo scheme. Distributed solar PV connection in China is administered by the National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid operators (State Grid, Southern Power Grid) under China's domestic distributed PV policies, referencing Chinese standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964-2024) designed for China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid. Chinese distributed connection approvals and grid-operator acceptance are not recognised in Costa Rica and give no presumption of compliance with the ARESEP/ICE/distributor generación distribuida interconnection requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有与哥斯达黎加「分布式自用发电」方案直接对应的计划。中国分布式太阳能光伏并网由国家能源局（NEA）和电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）在中国国内分布式光伏政策下管理，引用为中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网设计的中国标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）。中国分布式并网审批和电网运营商接受不被哥斯达黎加认可，不给予ARESEP/ICE/配电商「分布式自用发电」并网要求的任何合规推定。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與哥斯大黎加「分散式自用發電」方案直接對應的計畫。中國分散式太陽能光伏併網由國家能源局（NEA）和電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）在中國國內分散式光伏政策下管理，引用為中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網設計的中國標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）。中國分散式併網審批和電網運營商接受不被哥斯大黎加認可，不給予ARESEP/ICE/配電商「分散式自用發電」併網要求的任何合規推定。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters — China 50 Hz)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters — China 50 Hz)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System — China 50 Hz)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters for Costa Rica generación distribuida projects must be reviewed and accepted by the relevant distributor (ICE, CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, or ESPH) under ARESEP's scheme. Chinese domestic distributed solar connection approvals do not transfer. Additionally, Costa Rica is ~99–100% renewable and highly dependent on grid stability; distributors may apply stricter anti-islanding and power-quality scrutiny than markets with conventional generation-dominated grids. Confirm inverter model eligibility, IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence at 60 Hz, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety test reports, and distributor-specific interconnection technical requirements with the relevant distributor before committing equipment to a Costa Rica project.
gap.zh: 差距：用于哥斯达黎加「分布式自用发电」项目的中国逆变器须经相关配电商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）在ARESEP方案下审查和接受。中国国内分布式太阳能并网审批不可移植。此外，哥斯达黎加约99–100%为可再生能源，高度依赖电网稳定性；配电商对防孤岛和电能质量的审查可能比以传统发电为主的市场更为严格。在将设备用于哥斯达黎加项目前，请向相关配电商确认逆变器型号资格、60 Hz下的IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 62109-1/-2安全测试报告及配电商特定并网技术要求。
gap.zht: 差距：用於哥斯大黎加「分散式自用發電」項目的中國逆變器須經相關配電商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）在ARESEP方案下審查和接受。中國國內分散式太陽能併網審批不可移植。此外，哥斯大黎加約99–100%為可再生能源，高度依賴電網穩定性；配電商對防孤島和電能質量的審查可能比以傳統發電為主的市場更為嚴格。在將設備用於哥斯大黎加項目前，請向相關配電商確認逆變器型號資格、60 Hz下的IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 62109-1/-2安全測試報告及配電商特定併網技術要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all distributed solar grid-connection projects under ARESEP generación distribuida para autoconsumo; distributor technical review and interconnection inspection are non-negotiable project gates
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed solar connection approvals are granted under China NEA policy and grid operator rules — not transferable to Costa Rica

source.publisher: ARESEP (Autoridad Reguladora de los Servicios Públicos) — Costa Rica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ARESEP generación distribuida para autoconsumo is a separate project approval gate from any Chinese domestic distributed solar approval. Confirm inverter model eligibility, IEC compliance evidence validated at 60 Hz, and distributor-specific technical requirements with the applicable distributor (ICE, CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, or ESPH) before project submission. Verify current ARESEP application requirements and distributor interconnection technical specifications directly at aresep.go.cr and each distributor's official site before committing equipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ARESEP「分布式自用发电」是独立于任何中国国内分布式太阳能审批的项目审批门槛。在项目提交前，请向适用配电商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）确认逆变器型号资格、在60 Hz下验证的IEC合规证据及配电商特定技术要求。在提交设备前，请直接在aresep.go.cr及各配电商官方网站核实当前ARESEP申请要求和配电商并网技术规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ARESEP「分散式自用發電」是獨立於任何中國國內分散式太陽能審批的項目審批門檻。在項目提交前，請向適用配電商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）確認逆變器型號資格、在60 Hz下驗證的IEC合規證據及配電商特定技術要求。在提交設備前，請直接在aresep.go.cr及各配電商官方網站核實當前ARESEP申請要求和配電商併網技術規格。
